View filter criteria is exposed to users with read-only permissions.

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Tables app is upgraded to 2.0.0 or 1.0.4.

### Workarounds

* Disable app Tables

### References

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3483753)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/tables/pull/2312)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)

title: Information Disclosure of view filter metadata via Broken Sensitive Data Masking in ViewService
